# Colors

#### Overview, Shades and Pseudo Classes

This page provides you an overview of colors, both the shades and pseudo classes. Colors names, values, and shades can be customized by using the `_variables.scss` file. See the [Customize](/customize/) section for more details.

Many classes, such as `background-color`, `border-color`, etc. make use of colors. See the [Classes with Colors] page for more information on these.

A good place to start with the overview of the "default" colors is by discussing the classes themselves, and the shades:
